## Requirements

**Code Change Documentation:**

- Add/update inline comments for public APIs or complex logic
  - [ ] No changes needed
  - [ ] Added / Updated

- SwiftUI Previews
  - [ ] No changes needed
  - [ ] Added / Updated

**Unit Tests:**

- [ ] N/A — no logic changes
- [ ] Added new tests
- [ ] Updated existing tests

**Code Change Testing:**

- [ ] Tested on real device (not just simulator)
- [ ] Tested in dark mode
- [ ] SwiftLint passes — zero warnings (`swiftlint --strict`)
- [ ] No force unwraps (`!`) introduced
- [ ] No hardcoded strings — using `DS` constants or `Localizable.strings`
- [ ] No API keys or secrets committed
- [ ] No debug `print()` statements left in

**CoreMotion / Notifications (if applicable):**

- [ ] N/A
- [ ] Tested inactivity detection on physical device
- [ ] Notification fires and action buttons respond correctly

**Genie / Claude API (if applicable):**

- [ ] N/A
- [ ] Context injection verified in API call
- [ ] API key accessed via Keychain only — never hardcoded
